sensoryProfile.sight: Stone buildings against the slope, watch platforms in the trees, ward monoliths burning pale, a narrow holding room cut by blue ward-light, and a disciplined yard with tack shelter, spare spears, and horses already being brought up under lantern light.
sensoryProfile.sound: Dropped voices around the yard, a horse stamping in the lean-to, metal brushing stone when the anchor comes free, and the ward-hum loud enough to get into a prisoner's teeth.
sensoryProfile.smell: Packed earth, horse, weathered leather, cold stone, clean ward-scent while the barrier is up, then metal-wet stone once it drops.
sensoryProfile.touch: Hard white border stone, the pressure of active wards, then the abrupt absence of that pressure when the circle opens.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Tense containment turning instantly into rapid deployment the moment Sylvanas decides the warning is worth testing.

establishedFacts.fact: Cyndia's post is a working Farstrider border station with secured holding space and immediate access to the ward line.
Jaina is held here after her staff, satchel, notes, crystals, and knife are confiscated.
Only a few rangers have seen the prisoner; the post is deliberately controlling who knows what.
The holding room is keyed to an anchor stone that can drop the ward barrier immediately when ordered.
The outpost can move from quiet custody to mounted field response within minutes, with horses and escort detail already organized in the yard.

eventsHere.event: Cyndia briefs Sylvanas on the disturbance and Jaina's capture.
Sylvanas examines the ward-stone, the confiscated satchel, and the holding room before beginning the interrogation.
Sylvanas interrogates Jaina, studies the confiscated map, releases her under escort terms, and launches the southbound ride from this yard.
